limitations: static current large-cap mapping is survivorship-biased
sector ETF mappings are coarse and current-state
borrow/short constraints not modeled beyond costs
selection_filters: Alpaca coverage >=95% of common date index
common-stock sleeve only; ETF controls not traded

data.source: qfa/Alpaca StockHistoricalDataClient real daily OHLCV, in-memory only

evaluation_protocol.random_window_method: 30 seeded random contiguous 252-trading-day windows drawn from available post-warmup history; universe fixed before performance review

gate_verdict.reason: Primary 10 bps run fails p25/worst random-window Sharpe and positive-window robustness; sector-continuation proxy is competitive/better on several windows; 20 bps further weakens performance.

orthogonality.exact_accepted_watchlist_stream_correlat: unavailable: retained artifacts for prior alphas are compact and do not include aligned daily return streams/equity curves
